task: Launch-quality advanced task: LiDAR Avalanche Photodiode Noise Budget Review. Reality context: an automotive LiDAR receiver underperforms at hot temperature in long-range mode. Use only the embedded packet (records, limits, and provided excerpt) to: identify the controlling noise term and an actionable mitigation; construct a decision table with baseline, mitigated, and sensitivity cases; produce a reproducible workbook or script that preserves intermediate calculations and validation checks; and deliver an expert-review memo. Constraints: recommendations must remain inside the provided budget, improve the identified controlling metric by at least 10%, cannot use external measurements, specialized licensed software, or hidden assumptions. Mark any contradictory or under-supported record as needs_review. Deliverables: apd_noise_budget.xlsx and design_note.md with formulas or executable logic, record-level citations, validation checks, sensitivity notes, and a final recommendation table suitable for expert review.
